sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), sale_date DATE);
INSERT INTO sales (id, amount, sale_date) VALUES (1, 200.50, '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO sales (id, amount, sale_date) VALUES (2, 150.75, '2023-01-02');
SELECT id, MIN(amount) OVER () AS min_amount FROM sales;
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.10 WHERE id = 1;
